prompt: A whimsical painterly illustration of a vintage turquoise station wagon driving along a coastal road, shown in clean side profile against a simple blue sky and calm ocean horizon. On the roof, tied down with 4 visible tan ropes, is an absurdly oversized white dog bone, rough-textured and sculptural, longer than the car itself. Inside the car are 4 dogs total: 1 golden-brown dog in the driver’s seat with one paw on the steering wheel, 2 golden-brown dogs sitting in the middle and rear windows looking outward, and 1 white-and-brown dog at the back with its head tilted slightly up. Use thick expressive oil-paint brushstrokes, soft impasto texture, slightly naive folk-art realism, gentle humor, and a minimalist composition with the car centered horizontally. The road is dark in the foreground with a thin sandy strip near the water, and the palette is dominated by sky blue, sea blue, faded turquoise, cream white, and warm brown. Bright daylight, no text, no extra objects, serene but funny road-trip mood.
